title: minekov
description:
A modpack designed to make minecraft super challenging, balanced by adding new weapons like guns and more.

You might not survive...
body:
Warning: This modpack is designed for you to struggle. A lot. I died countless times in the first 100 hours of my gameplay, and only after that was I able to conquer the nether. Be prepared to die and be unable to reclaim your items when hundreds of mobs swarm your body. You'll need to risk it all to create a stable base.

Even passive mobs (cows, sheep, chickens, etc.) will attack the player if they attempt to harm them...

# Included Mods
- The Essential mod allows you to host your singleplayer world with your friends to join online (no port forwarding!).
- Extremely hard vanilla mobs, guns, backpacks/tom's storage as well as bonfires and lots of structures/boss mobs.
- True Darkness (Incredibly dark caves and night time...)
- TACZ and Superb Warfare also included to provide much-needed firepower.
- Simple planes will help you travel, as well as a couple other transportation mods.
- Bonfires are available after you unlock the nether and collect some blaze rods. Although- this mod might not be perfectly stable for multiplayer and will be extremely hard to acquire in the early game.
- It also has Create and Computer Craft as well as project red.
- Oculus for shaders.
- Borderless window mode.
- Just Enough Items, What am I looking at?, Artifacts, Curios, and other quality of life mods.
- Many more including Cataclysm and other boss mods (approximately 128 mods).
 
I will likely be updating the modpack as time goes on to make things more difficult in the end-game, and hopefully more PvP aspects too.

# You Might Not Survive...
The difficulty of this modpack is pretty high. Included are some AI advancements to mobs that allow them to break blocks, snipe you from long distances, roll incredible stat modifiers that allow them to kill you in 1 hit or run 3x faster than you can.

Mining below 0 will pose as a huge challenge, especially for players just getting started or who aren't very skilled at minecraft survival/gun play.

If you die, don't worry- your items will not despawn or explode thanks to the gravestones mod. Waypoints will also tell you exactly where they are.

# Origins
I put together this modpack for my friends and I and have began a youtube mini-series linked below.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bbOq8Cqtqt4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Stability
There are currently ~128 mods. It should be a reasonably stable gameplay loop (recommending a minimum of 4096MB of ram). Only tested with 2 players at the same time running an Essential server. It was somewhat laggy on my beefcake machine, so be aware a dedicated server might be the way if you've got a less powerful machine.

# Future Plans
I might be adding Equivalent Exchange (if a stable port for 1.20.1 comes out) as well as build craft and maybe some other tekkit/FTB style mods. I hope to also add new gunpacks and customizations.

Also, I really want to make this multiplayer PvP friendly, so I may potentially in the future create a public server with special features geared towards this. If you would like to stay in the loop about these kinds of updates, or get to know me and my friends, [join the minekov discord](https://discord.gg/AkdHhZwm) to stay in sync!

# Credits/Acknowledgements
If you would like to be credited/part of the development process- please DM me on discord. My username is `verbiiyo`.

# Consider Supporting :D
If you like me (verbii) and want to see me develop mods/keep updating minekov, [join our discord](https://discord.gg/AkdHhZwm) or [become a supporter for me on github <3](https://github.com/sponsors/verbiiyo)
